This LLC has served as a versatile entity for various consulting projects over the years, spanning a wide range of industries. Leveraging my expertise in operations, marketing, communications, and manufacturing, the LLC has provided a steady vehicle for income opportunities. While it has not been associated with significant capital ventures, it has consistently supported diverse professional engagements and demonstrated flexibility in adapting to evolving industry needs.

In the Weeds Consulting was designed originally to work with scientists and doctors in the emerging compliant/legal plant botanical industries in the United States. With my background of taking technical matters and explaining them to consumers or legislators.  However, with Covid closing many of my clients during the pandemic these efforts had been halted along with my transition the last two years into politics.  I have kept the entity incase of the opportunity presented to go back into this space, but will dissolve if working for the Federal Government.

This position was paid through the Nevada Republican Party, but also worked directly with the RNC and the Trump Campaign.  Interpretation & Compliance: Review and analyze election laws to ensure full compliance, providing clear guidance to campaign staff and volunteers. Voter Information & Outreach: Serve as the main contact for voter registration and election information, responding to inquiries across multiple platforms. Page 1 Sara Rose Kennedy | SaraRoseKennedy@gmail.com | (310) 293-4933 | www.linkedin.com/in/sararosekennedy Recruitment & Training: Lead the recruitment and training of poll workers, watchers, and volunteers for the 2024 election, ensuring they understand legal and procedural duties. Special Projects & Issue Resolution: Manage special projects and handle urgent election issues with discretion and judgment. Stakeholder Engagement: Build relationships with election officials, partners, and community leaders to strengthen the campaign’s election integrity strategy. Worked closely with RNC legal team and Nevada lawyers consulting with NevadaGOP to monitor complaints and concerns centered around the election integrity of the State of Nevada, with the sole purpose of creating a free and fair election in Nevada.

Income generated through consulting projects over an extended period, with some years yielding no revenue and others reflecting an average annual salary.
I serve as Vice President and elections are held annually.  I receive accrued income for advisory and management, acquisitions, and strategy. (2014-12-01)

I have been the sole managing member of this entity for many years, utilizing it for occasional consulting across a diverse range of industries, including communications, marketing, manufacturing advisory, and general consulting services.
